faqs.question: Why are stink bugs so common in Lynbrook homes?
faqs.answer: Lynbrook's suburban setting with mature trees and residential properties provides ideal overwintering sites for stink bugs. These pests enter homes through small cracks and gaps in fall, seeking warmth. Our $350-$550 treatment includes sealing entry points and targeted elimination to keep them out.

faqs.question: What does your stink bug control service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough inspection of your Lynbrook property, identification of entry points, targeted treatment of affected areas, exclusion work to seal gaps, and preventative measures. We also provide follow-up support to ensure complete elimination of the infestation.

faqs.question: When is the best time to treat for stink bugs in Lynbrook?
faqs.answer: The ideal time is late summer to early fall before stink bugs enter homes for winter. However, we provide effective treatments year-round. If you're seeing stink bugs inside your Lynbrook home now, immediate treatment can prevent them from settling in and multiplying.

faqs.question: Are your stink bug treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed technicians. Our treatments target stink bugs specifically while maintaining the safety of your Lynbrook home environment. We'll provide specific safety instructions during service.
